description_for_human: Design portfolio of Tianxiong Zhong featuring transportation design, industrial design, illustration, and furniture design projects.
description_for_model: Portfolio website of Tianxiong Zhong, a design student at Hochschule München specializing in transportation design, industrial design, illustration, and furniture design. Contains project galleries, contact information, and professional background. The site showcases four main projects: Tesla Cyberrad (motorcycle concept), Readymade Motorcycle, The Book of Time (illustration), and LittleEasy Table (furniture).
